kinesisanalyticsv2.application.vpcconfig: Describes the parameters of a VPC used by the application.

kinesisanalyticsv2.application.vpcconfig.Description: The array of [SecurityGroup](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_SecurityGroup.html) IDs used by the VPC configuration.
The array of [Subnet](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/APIReference/API_Subnet.html) IDs used by the VPC configuration.
